meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scalability. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your workflow and ship client apps faster.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance business, you must move from bespoke coding to modular architecture. By leveraging the Antigravity template combined with Claude Code, you standardize your environment, automate boilerplate, and enforce consistent coding patterns. This system turns your repetitive development cycles into a high-speed, repeatable, and profitable production line.
content.intro:
You are staring at your third project this month, realizing the code structure is a mess and your previous work isn't reusable. You are trapped in the 'bespoke bottleneck,' where every new client requires a complete architectural rebuild. The clock is ticking, your margins are shrinking, and the anxiety of missed deadlines is mounting.

But what if you could treat every project like a modular assembly line? The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it is an opinionated framework designed to eliminate decision fatigue. When paired with the raw power of Claude Code, you move from being a developer who writes every line to an architect who orchestrates high-performance systems in minutes.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Core
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure to ensure all future projects inherit the same directory patterns and configuration standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project template focused on a scalable SaaS architecture. Include pre-configured linting, environment variable management, and modular service patterns.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use the template's schema definitions to enforce data integrity across the entire application layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate domain models for a multi-tenant user system. Ensure all models follow the Antigravity pattern for repository separation.

steps.title: Implement Modular API Routes
steps.description: Automate the creation of API endpoints that adhere to the template's strict request/response cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for user authentication and CRUD operations, adhering to the Antigravity controller-service pattern.

steps.title: Inject Client-Specific Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject specific business requirements into your standardized framework without breaking the core architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate custom subscription logic into the existing service layer while maintaining full compatibility with the Antigravity template structure.

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Ensure the project scales safely by running automated integrity checks against the template standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit and integration tests for all newly implemented services. Validate against the Antigravity template best practices.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'golden' version of your Antigravity template in a private repo to keep your base dependencies updated.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your common client naming conventions so you never have to re-explain your style guide.
Automate the deployment pipeline within the template to trigger on every push to the 'main' branch, saving 30 minutes of manual DevOps per project.
Create a custom 'Antigravity-config.json' that defines your preferred third-party SDKs to ensure zero-configuration setup for new clients.
Run periodic architecture audits using Claude Code to ensure your project hasn't drifted from the original template standards over time.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, extract your successful custom modules into a library, update your base Antigravity template, and start your next project with 40% less effort.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance empire with a professional, automated workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
